cases.note: preserve grade ε dominates every floor (calculus §Worked check)
Predicated is strictly below any Attenuated(δ) (chain order per R-2026-07-07 (A2), ADR 0004)
named intentional drop; the floor demands only what survives
projecting away the bearer → bond Withheld ⊏ Intact
Attenuated(⊤) is below every finite attenuation (honest unknown)
Severed ⊏ Intact; the type also becomes FloatingQuality
Fused ⊒ Fused; the label keeps plurality recoverable
demanding Single but getting Fused → insufficient
Attenuated(2) still meets floor A(10); the collapse edge drops below it

A3 (R-2026-07-07-03): Attenuated(0) on quality normalizes to Present at ingest, so the Present floor is met there and only fate.record fails — without normalization the witness coordinate would be fate.quality
A3 twin: identical to atten-zero-normalizes but quality is written Present — same verdict, witness and coordinate prove Atten(0) ≡ Present
back-compat: the same document under version 0.1 is accepted, normalized and graded identically (IR 0.2 accepts both versions; wire format unchanged)
